text: Good morning! Can you pull up today's calendar and reminders?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Saturday, October 12. No work meetings today. You have working on the garage cabinetry and Ethan's soccer practice scheduled.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Hey Jarvis, Enjoying a cold beer on the deck. The weather tonight in Frisco is perfect. It is nice to have some quiet time.
title: Personal Update

text: Understood. Personal time is valuable. You've earned it! Friday deck relaxation is the best way to spend the evening. I'll silence any notification logs.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick update: Doing some cleaning around the house. I think the spark plug on the mower is dirty. Glad I caught it early.
title: Household Update

text: Logged that. Good call on checking that. I can look up a quick spark plug cleaning guide for your mower model. I'll update the home maintenance log.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Just wanted to mention that lily had her gymnastics class at the community center. Lily's gymnastics class signup opens online tomorrow. Feeling good about their progress.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Sure thing! Sounds exciting! I've added the signup time to your alerts so you can secure a spot. I'll track the schedule.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Jarvis, Planning our weekly meals today. We want to try a home-cooked chicken parmesan on Thursday. Want to keep meals simple and healthy.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Healthy choices are great. Recipe saved. I've added marinara and mozzarella to the grocery list. Let me know how the recipe turns out.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Hey Jarvis, We brought our new golden retriever puppy, Cooper, home today. She was throwing broccoli on the floor demanding fruit snacks. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Logged that. That sounds like a sweet moment. Toddler nutrition is a constant negotiation. Blending veggies into sauce works well. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, Having dinner with our friends tonight. Sarah and Kim are organizing the Memorial block party. Looking forward to the weekend.
title: Social Update

text: Logged that. I've noted the plans. Great neighborhood event. I can help organize the signup sheets. I can suggest more board games.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Listening to a podcast in the garage. My starting running back is questionable. Just taking it easy tonight.
title: Personal Update

text: Understood. Personal time is valuable. Injury report checked. Playing your backup is the safer option. Enjoy the episode!
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Jarvis, Doing some cleaning around the house. I adjusted the automated lighting sensors to save energy. Need to keep the house in shape.
title: Household Update

text: Got it, Mike. Let's get that resolved. Smart move. I've updated the Jarvis automation dim rules after 9 PM. Let me know if you need any replacement parts ordered.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Quick update: Ethan is practicing his piano lessons in the living room. Ethan is practicing Für Elise for the upcoming piano recital. It's a busy schedule but worth it.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Logged that. Great progress. He's making fast progress. I can set a practice timer to help him prepare. Go Frisco FC!
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Putting together our grocery list. We need a quick dinner that the kids will actually eat. That should cover us for the week.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Meal planning saves so much time. How about taco night? It's fast, and you have beef and shells ready. Enjoy the grilling tonight!
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick update: Lily refused to eat her dinner today. She was throwing broccoli on the floor demanding fruit snacks. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. Screen time is always a negotiation. Toddler nutrition is a constant negotiation. Blending veggies into sauce works well. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick log: Hosted a game night at our place. We are meeting Dave and Kim at a new restaurant. Always a fun neighborhood crowd.
title: Social Update

text: Sure thing! I've mapped the locations. Enjoy! I've set reservation alerts and mapped the route to Plano. Have a great time!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick update before bed, logging the journal. Pretty relaxing weekend day. Got some yard work done and cleaned up. Ethan had fun with soccer, and Lily did great. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: I've saved tonight's journal. Sleep well, Mike.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
